title: melissa rotundifolia
intro: Melissa rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved balm or round-leaved melissa, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The leaves and flowers of this plant possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Melissa rotundifolia include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Herbal preparations of Melissa rotundifolia can be found in teas, infusions, and topical creams, where it is often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
